name: Barrel Extender
description: An augmentation which increases the effective range of any ranged weapon.

name: Capacity Expander
description: An augmentation which increases the ammo capacity of any ranged weapon, but increases overall volume.

name: Disruptive Coating
description: An augmentation which increases the shield damage of any ranged weapon.

name: Disruptor M11 Heavy Kit
description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which increases damage and reduces overall volume, but reduces accuracy and ammo capacity.

name: Disruptor M11 Quickloader
description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which reduces reload times and increases rate of fire, but reduces damage output and accuracy, and increases overall volume.

name: Disruptor M11 Sprayer
description: An augmentation for the Disruptor M11 which increases ammo capacity and rate of fire, but increases reload times and overall volume.

name: Drillshot FK7 Amplifier
description: An augmentation for the Drillshot FK7 which increases damage and reduces overall volume, but reduces ammo capacity.

name: Drillshot FK7 Sprayer
description: An augmentation for the Drillshot FK7 which increases rate of fire and ammo capacity, but reduces damage output and increases recoil and overall volume.

name: GRDA 44 Expander
description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases ammo capacity and effective range, but increases shot spread and reduces damage output.

name: GRDA 44 Micro-Rigidity Coating
description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases effective range and accuracy, and reduces recoil and overall volume, but reduces ammo capacity.

name: GRDA 44 Optimizer
description: An augmentation for the GRDA 44 which increases damage output, reduces shot spread and overall volume, but at the cost of ammo capacity.

name: Heavy Caliber Upgrade
description: An augmentation which increases the damage output of any ranged weapon.

name: JABAL Spitdart Amplifier
description: An augmentation for the JABAL Spitdart Rifle which increases damage, but increases recoil.

name: JABAL Spitdart Expander
description: An augmentation for JABAL Spitdart Rifles which increases ammo capacity and rate of fire, but reduces effective range, accuracy, and damage output and increases overall volume.

name: JABAL Spitdart Tactical Enhancer
description: An augmentation for the JABAL Spitdart Rifle which increases headshot damage, but increases recoil.

name: Lasgun Harmonizer
description: An augmentation for Lasguns which increases the rate of fire of the beam, reduces recoil, and reduces power drain, however the range of the beam and its damage output are reduced, and overall volume is increased.

name: Maula Pistol Barrel Extender
description: An augmentation for Maula Pistols that increases effective range and accuracy and reduces reload times, but reduces overall rate of fire.

name: Missile Launcher Fragmenter
description: An augmentation for Missile Launchers which increases area of effect and reduces reload times, but reduces shield damage.

name: Missile Launcher Heavy Payload
description: An augmentation for Missile Launchers which increases their damage output, but reduces shield damage and area of effect.

name: Precision Barrel Adjuster
description: An augmentation which increases the accuracy of any ranged weapon.

name: Quick-release Trigger
description: An augmentation which increases the rate of fire of any ranged weapon.

name: Quickloader
description: An augmentation which reduces the reload time of any ranged weapon.

name: Rafiq Snubnose Heavy Kit
description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose heavy pistol which focuses on improving the stopping power of the gun, but makes it harder to handle. This increases the damage and headshot damage of the gun at the cost of reducing the fire rate.

name: Rafiq Snubnose Quickdraw Assembly
description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose which reduces recoil and reload time and improves accuracy but reduces overall stopping power.

name: Rafiq Snubnose Sprayer
description: An augmentation for the Rafiq Snubnose which increases the weapon's fire rate at the cost of shield damage.

name: Recoil Adjuster
description: An augmentation which reduces the recoil of any ranged weapon.

name: Tactical Enhancer
description: An augmentation which increases the headshot damage of any ranged weapon.

name: VULCAN GAU-92 Focuser
description: An augmentation for the VULCAN GAU-92 which increases range and accuracy and reduces recoil, however rate of fire is reduced.
